SophonLabs

focuses on blockchain media and
investment research

Services

01

Research Investment

Excellent web3 and native crypto analysts, researchers and technologists from around the world.

02

Media

Providing the most cutting-edge decentralized and valuable information for crypto and web3 builder.

03

Initiation

We support potential startups with our extensive network of mentors and partners to build market-fit products.

04

Web3 Development

We provide tech experts and professional developers who have been forced to turn our client's ideas into reality.

Value & Vision

We support disruptive blockchain innovations.

SophonLabs has a professional investment and research team that focuses on the discovery and creation of value through analytical research based on the most impactful and promising global blockchain and Web3.0 projects that will bring a paradigm shift to the world.

SophonLabs provides comprehensive support to its portfolio projects through business consultancy, resources, and engagement with a broader community to help create long-term value.

News & Blog

Cryptography in Sui.

Our Cryptography in Sui blog post series highlights the technologies that maintain secure transactions and usability on the Sui network.

Mystenlabs | SophonLabs | 8 Dec 2022

Why We Created Sui Move.

Move was born in 2018 during the early days of the Libra project — two Mysten founders (Evan and myself) were also on the founding team of Libra.

Mystenlabs | SophonLabs | 25 Aug 2022

Sui Full Node & Validator Selection Announcement.

The Sui community has come to life! We have received 28,000 validator applications from more than 80 countries.

About Us

SophonLabs is a Web3 startup accelerator focusing on incubation and investment research by Sophon Capital.

Contact Us

We are continuously on the lookout for refreshing ideas, business, and partnership opportunities. We invite you to contact us by submitting a business proposal and any resources that could help us to evaluate your application
